Package microui.core.style.theme

Class AbstractTheme

java.lang.Object
microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
Direct Known Subclasses:
ThemeBlack, ThemeGlass, ThemeGray, ThemeWhite
public abstract class AbstractTheme extends Object
Abstract base class for defining color themes in the MicroUI framework. Provides a contract for all theme implementations to define consistent color schemes across different UI components and states.

Themes define the visual appearance of the application by providing color values for various UI elements and interaction states. Subclasses must implement all abstract methods to provide a complete theme.

See Also:
